title: ModifiedBy
description: Information about the actor who made the change.

id.description: System-generated ID of the user or client.

type.description: The type of actor that made the change.

clientId.description: ID of the API client used to make the change.

anonymousId.description: Anonymous session ID if the change was made without a customer login.

isPlatformClient.description: Whether the change was made via the Merchant Center.
